***Vulpia fasciculata***, the **dune fescue**, is a species of annual herb in the family [Poaceae](/wiki/Poaceae "Poaceae") (true grasses). They have a self-supporting growth form and simple, broad leaves. Individuals can grow to 0.24 m.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
